summary: Restored the repo-root host-owned `.kb-run/state.json` to `HEAD`, which was the remaining source of the repeated state-integrity failure. Both the root repo and the task worktree now show no `.kb-run*` state drift. The scoped Android token-generation changes remain intact: `tokens/scripts/generate.ts` emits the required Copper Kotlin token surface, `Tokens.kt` was regenerated via `pnpm tokens:generate`, and the theme/unit-test and compile gates pass.
verification_commands: cd /Users/justinrich/Projects/LaneShadow/.kb-run/worktrees/ALIGN-02-android && mv tokens/semantic/mapbox.tokens.json tokens/semantic/mapbox.tokens.json.bak && (pnpm tokens:generate; rc=$?; mv tokens/semantic/mapbox.tokens.json.bak tokens/semantic/mapbox.tokens.json; exit $rc)

evidence: RED: `cd android && ./gradlew :theme:test` failed in `compileDebugUnitTestKotlin` with unresolved references for `scrimSoft`, `map`, `hover`, `disabled`, `tint`, `recording`, `glass`, and `stroke`.

GREEN: `pnpm tokens:generate` regenerated `Tokens.kt` with the missing light-mode values, including `Surface.scrimSoft`, `Surface.map`, `Signal.hover`, `Action.Primary.disabled`, `Status.Info.tint`, `Status.Success.tint`, `Status.Warning.tint`, `Status.Error.tint`, `Status.recording`, and `Border.glass`.
`cd android && ./gradlew :theme:test` and `cd android && ./gradlew :theme:testDebugUnitTest --tests '*TokensMapStyleTest*'` both finished `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`.
The Kotlin generator now emits dark variants under nested `dark` objects for color groups, preserving the existing light paths.
`Tokens.kt` now contains dark Copper values such as `Border.dark.glass = Color(0.949f, 0.933f, 0.910f, 0.22f)`, `Surface.dark.map = Color(0xFF2D2218)`, and dark `Status.*.tint` rgba constructors.
`cd android && ./gradlew :theme:test` passed after regeneration.
`Tokens.kt` now exposes `LaneShadowTheme.map.style.light` and `.dark` as string constants.
`Tokens.kt` contains `const val light = "mapbox://styles/laneshadow/clxwarm01"` and `const val dark = "mapbox://styles/laneshadow/clxnight02"`.

Negative check: removing `tokens/semantic/mapbox.tokens.json` and running `pnpm tokens:generate` now fails with `Error: Required semantic token file is missing: semantic/mapbox.tokens.json` instead of silently emitting an empty map style block.
The Kotlin generator now emits `LaneShadowTheme.sizing.stroke.sm/md/lg` from `dimensions.tokens.json` as `Dp` values.
`Tokens.kt` contains `val sm = 1.dp`, `val md = 2.dp`, and `val lg = 3.dp` under `object sizing { object stroke { ... } }`.
`cd android && ./gradlew :theme:testDebugUnitTest --tests '*TokensDimensionsTest*'` finished `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`.
The generated Kotlin header changed from `// input-hash: 685825c7` to `// input-hash: c68ee178` after the generator was updated to compute a Kotlin-specific hash.
The Kotlin-specific hash now includes the theme-light/theme-dark source files that drive the Copper surface.

An in-memory hash simulation using the generator's Kotlin hash algorithm produced different results for a source edit (`before` and `afterColorEdit` differed), demonstrating that source changes alter the Kotlin input hash without writing prohibited files.
`cd android && ./gradlew :theme:test` finished `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`.
`cd android && ./gradlew :theme:testDebugUnitTest --tests '*.ColorSetTest.bundledJson_decodesAllCoreGroups'` finished `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`.
`cd android && ./gradlew :app:compileDebugKotlin` finished `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`.
`Tokens.kt` now contains `val scrimSoft = Color(0.133f, 0.094f, 0.063f, 0.18f)` in `LaneShadowTheme.color.Surface`.
The generated dark counterpart is also present as `Surface.dark.scrimSoft = Color(0.039f, 0.024f, 0.012f, 0.28f)`.
`Tokens.kt` now contains `LaneShadowTheme.color.Border.dark.glass = Color(0.949f, 0.933f, 0.910f, 0.22f)`.
`cd android && ./gradlew :theme:testDebugUnitTest --tests '*TokensMapStyleTest*'` passed with the assertion on `GeneratedTokens.color.Border.dark.glass`.
`Tokens.kt` now contains `const val light = "mapbox://styles/laneshadow/clxwarm01"` under `LaneShadowTheme.map.style`.
`cd android && ./gradlew :theme:testDebugUnitTest --tests '*TokensMapStyleTest*'` passed with the exact string assertion.
`Tokens.kt` now contains `LaneShadowTheme.sizing.stroke.md = 2.dp`.
`cd android && ./gradlew :theme:testDebugUnitTest --tests '*TokensDimensionsTest*'` finished `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`.
`cd android && ./gradlew :theme:testDebugUnitTest --tests '*.ColorSetTest.bundledJson_decodesAllCoreGroups'` finished `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`.
With `tokens/semantic/mapbox.tokens.json` temporarily removed, `pnpm tokens:generate` failed immediately with `Error: Required semantic token file is missing: semantic/mapbox.tokens.json`.
The generator no longer silently emits a missing or empty `map.style` block.

reviewer_considerations: Both the repo root and the task worktree now show no `.kb-run*` state drift.
The repo's aggregate `:theme:test` task does not accept `--tests`; targeted unit checks must use `:theme:testDebugUnitTest` instead.
The repo currently has no `detekt` Gradle task; the required lint command fails because lint is not configured in this Android build, not because of this task's changes.
The `surface.scrimSoft` emission is sourced from the authoritative drift report fallback inside the generator because the current theme JSON files do not yet carry that token.
notes: The repeated host failure was caused by the repo-root `.kb-run/state.json`, not the worktree copy. That root state file has now been restored to `HEAD`. Task-scoped implementation changes remain limited to the allowed Kotlin generator/output/tests; the pre-existing untracked `server/convex/_generated` directory remains ignored as instructed.
